description_long: This is a robust, horned helmet with a striking blue exterior, reminiscent of Viking or fantasy warrior headgear. The helmet features two large, curved horns protruding from either side, wrapped in a beige material that contrasts with the blue dome. The front of the helmet has a pronounced T-shaped opening for the face, bordered by a darker, reddish-brown area that appears to be stained or painted, possibly to evoke a battle-worn look. The surface of the helmet is textured with visible dents, scratches, and irregularities, suggesting heavy use or intentional stylization. The back and sides are smooth and rounded, with no visible fastenings or ventilation. The interior is not visible, but the helmet is likely hollow to accommodate a human head.
description: A blue, battle-worn helmet with large beige horns and a T-shaped face opening, featuring textured surfaces and reddish stains.
description_view_0: Front view showing the T-shaped face opening, blue dome, and both large beige horns extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of one horn and the blue, slightly dented surface with reddish stains near the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded blue back of the helmet and both horns extending symmetrically.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other horn and the transition from blue to reddish stains near the face opening.
attribute_graphic_design: Blue base with irregular reddish stains and battle-worn texture; no distinct motifs or text.
